# GitHub Actions allowlist — paste into:
#   Settings → Actions → General → "Allow X, vaipakam, and select non-X actions"
#
# Set policy to "Allow vaipakam, and select non-X actions" then add the
# pattern list below.
#
# Each entry is SHA-pinned in `.github/workflows/*.yml` — the allowlist
# pattern uses the action's repo path (without SHA) since Settings UI
# accepts wildcards but not SHAs.
#
# Audited 2026-05-20 against every `uses:` in .github/workflows/.

# GitHub-published (covered by the built-in "Allow actions by GitHub" toggle):
actions/add-to-project@*
actions/cache@*
actions/checkout@*
actions/configure-pages@*
actions/deploy-pages@*
actions/setup-node@*
actions/upload-artifact@*
actions/upload-pages-artifact@*
github/codeql-action/*@*

# Foundry — official Foundry GitHub Action:
foundry-rs/foundry-toolchain@*

# pnpm — official pnpm Action:
pnpm/action-setup@*

# Third-party (review per-bump):
crytic/slither-action@*          # Trail of Bits — Slither's official Action
dorny/paths-filter@*             # widely-used path-filter helper
softprops/action-gh-release@*    # widely-used release-attach Action

imjohnbo/issue-bot@*              # used by .github/workflows/iteration-kickoff-sync.yml
release-drafter/release-drafter@* # used by .github/workflows/release-drafter.yml

# DENY everything else.
